Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A new C++ back end for ocamlc 130 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Show HN: Git bayesect – Bayesian Git bisection for non-deterministic bugs 233 upvotes, 33 comments
  3. Fast and Gorgeous Erosion Filter 102 upvotes, 13 comments
  4. Jax's true calling: Ray-Marching renderers on WebGL 66 upvotes, 9 comments
  5. Quantum computing bombshells that are not April Fools 76 upvotes, 13 comments
  6. The revenge of the data scientist 116 upvotes, 23 comments
  7. Ariane 6 user's manual [pdf] 53 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. SolveSpace (open source 2D/3D CAD) working on Windows 2000 (2025) 27 upvotes, 4 comments
  9. Weather.com/Retro 55 upvotes, 15 comments
  10. Solar Balconies Take Europe by Storm 30 upvotes, 8 comments
  11. StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles) 150 upvotes, 65 comments
  12. Signing data structures the wrong way 84 upvotes, 40 comments
  13. Scientists crack a 20-year nuclear mystery behind the creation of gold 65 upvotes, 30 comments
  14. Steam on Linux Use Skyrocketed Above 5% in March 54 upvotes, 24 comments
  15. What Gödel Discovered (2020) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. Set the Line Before It's Crossed 46 upvotes, 22 comments
  17. The Claude Code Leak 29 upvotes, 12 comments
  18. EmDash – A spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 510 upvotes, 360 comments
  19. AI for American-produced cement and concrete 171 upvotes, 109 comments
  20. Trinity Large Thinking 19 upvotes, 7 comments
  21. The Windows equivalents of the most used Linux commands 31 upvotes, 15 comments
  22. Show HN: Dull – Instagram Without Reels, YouTube Without Shorts (iOS) 62 upvotes, 39 comments
  23. DRAM pricing is killing the hobbyist SBC market 364 upvotes, 302 comments
  24. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026) 219 upvotes, 181 comments
  25. Live: Artemis II Launch Day Updates 740 upvotes, 683 comments
  26. Show HN: Semantic atlas of 188 constitutions in 3D (30k articles, embeddings) 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. SpaceX files to go public 254 upvotes, 318 comments
  28. IPv6 address, as a sentence you can remember 44 upvotes, 55 comments
  29. Escaping the Ogallala Trap 6 upvotes, 8 comments
  30. InspectMind AI (YC W24) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 12:30pm, 2 April 2026. Source here.
